name: financial-feminist
description: Tori Dunlap's Financial Feminist — master your money by combining practical financial skills (budgeting, debt, investing, earning) with awareness of the emotional and systemic forces that shape your relationship with money
useCase: Helps women (and anyone) take control of their finances through the 5-step Financial Game Plan: know your numbers, build an emergency fund, pay off debt, invest for the future, and increase your income — all while addressing money shame and systemic barriers.
knownRisks: Financial advice should be adapted to individual circumstances — consult a professional for complex situations
Investment returns are not guaranteed; past performance does not predict future results
